leads.name: Collide Capital
leads.notes: Closed $95M Fund II on April 9, 2026. Founded by Brian Hollins and Aaron Samuels. Total AUM now $170M+. Portfolio: 75+ companies including Butter, Slang.ai, Rheaply. Top quartile TVPI on Fund I. Fund II: $1-3M checks, 30+ companies. Successfully scaled from proof-of-concept to institutional-grade firm. May need ongoing fund counsel as they scale. Already deployed to 5 companies (Art Lab, Jelou, Ocho, Prefix, Sytrex).

leads.name: Modus
leads.notes: Raised $85M led by Lightspeed on April 7, 2026. AI-native audit technology + accounting firm holding company. Founders from Palantir, Citadel, Ramp, Thoma Bravo, Bridgewater, AWS. Already invested in a top-200 accounting firm with $30M+ revenue. Plans to double organic growth rate. Scaling rapidly — needs AI governance and compliance consulting for regulated financial services audit work.

leads.name: Zocks
leads.notes: Raised $45M Series B (Jan 2026) led by Lightspeed + QED. Total $65M raised. 5,000+ financial firms use Zocks. Enterprise customers include Ameritas, Carson Group, Kestra Financial, Osaic. Saves advisors 10+ hours/week. Expanding agentic AI capabilities. Financial services B2B = Katie's core PR/marketing ICP. Growing fast in regulated fintech space — needs brand authority.

leads.name: JetStream Security
leads.notes: Raised $34M seed (Redpoint Ventures, CrowdStrike Falcon Fund) on March 2026. CEO Raj Rajamani (ex-CrowdStrike CPO). Angels: George Kurtz (CrowdStrike), Assaf Rappaport (Wiz), Frederic Kerrest (Okta). Already working with F500 companies. AI governance for enterprise AI = hot market. Plans to expand engineering, product, GTM teams. Strong candidate for AI consulting partnership.

leads.name: Ridge AI
leads.notes: Emerged from stealth April 6, 2026 with $2.6M pre-seed led by Madrona. CEO Ellie Fields (ex-Tableau SVP, ex-Salesloft CPO/CEngO). CTO Jeff Heer (Stanford AI Lab). Angels from Tableau, Streamlit, Cloudera founders. B2B SaaS analytics embedded product. Fresh from stealth = needs brand story and launch PR. Strong pedigree. Small but high-credibility team.

leads.name: Atlas Card
leads.notes: Raised $40M on April 8, 2026 with backing from Elad Gil. Members-only concierge charge card. CEO Patrick Mrozowski. New York-based. Premium consumer fintech with aspirational brand needs = strong PR/brand story opportunity. Big round = scaling and needs market awareness.

leads.name: Regology
leads.notes: YC-backed AI regulatory compliance platform. 60 employees. Founded by ex-PwC compliance pros with 7 years implementing compliance at large financial institutions. Covers US Federal, all 50 states, and global jurisdictions. Growing fast in RegTech market (40%+ deal growth YoY). May need outside legal consulting for complex regulatory matters their platform surfaces. Also a potential partnership: Regology does AI compliance monitoring, Katie's legal consulting handles the execution.

leads.name: Avec
leads.notes: Raised $8.4M seed on April 8, 2026 led by Lightspeed. Limited public info available — needs further research. Lightspeed backing signals quality. Early-stage = needs brand building. Lower confidence lead until more info is available.
